title: Thank You for Being My First Friend ❤️
message: Before I knew what friendship really meant, I already had one in you. Thank you for growing up beside me and filling my childhood with memories I'll cherish forever.

title: Thank You for Taking Care of Me 🤍
message: When my hand was fractured, you quietly became my strength. You helped me with the smallest things without ever making me feel like a burden. I'll never forget those days.

title: Thank You for Choosing Us Over Ego 🤝
message: Whenever we argued, you were usually the first one to come back and say, 'Okay bro... let's sort it out.' That simple sentence protected our relationship more times than you'll ever know.

title: Thank You for Every Laugh 😂
message: From funny reels to go-kart races, from random selfies to acting like Oscar winners... thank you for making ordinary days feel unforgettable.

title: Thank You for Every Festival 🌸
message: Bathukamma, Diwali, birthdays, temple visits... they were never just festivals to me. They became beautiful memories because you were part of every single one.

title: Thank You for Believing in Me 🌟
message: Even when I doubted myself or became stubborn, you never stopped believing that things would become okay. Sometimes your confidence in me was stronger than my own.

title: Thank You for Being You 😊
message: You never tried to become someone else just to impress people. Your kindness, your innocence, your smile, and your caring heart are exactly what make you so special.

title: Thank You for Every Tiny Memory 📸
message: Some of my favourite memories aren't perfect photos. They're blurry pictures, pixelated selfies, funny expressions, and moments that nobody else would understand—but we always will.

title: Thank You for Loving Me Even When I'm Impossible 😅
message: I know I'm stubborn. I know I get angry sometimes. I know I can be difficult. Yet somehow, you've always found a way to care for me anyway. That means more than I can ever put into words.

title: Thank You for That One Birthday 🎂
message: I'll never forget the day I refused to come for Mom's birthday cake cutting. Everyone tried to convince me, but you never gave up. Looking back, that wasn't just about cake—it was your way of saying our family matters.

title: Thank You for Making Home Feel Alive 🏡
message: Home was never just walls and a roof. It was your laughter, your random singing, your teasing, your silly conversations, and your presence that made it feel complete.

title: Thank You for Every Version of You 🌈
message: The little girl with chubby cheeks. The sister who raced me in go-karts. The girl who hid from my camera. The one who smiled while lighting diyas. Every version of you has given me memories I'll treasure forever.

title: Thank You for Existing 💖
message: Out of all the blessings life has given me, one of the greatest has always been you. If I had the chance to choose my sister all over again, I'd still choose you—every single time.

title: One Last Thank You... 🥹
message: Thank you for being the reason behind so many of my smiles. Thank you for making my childhood beautiful. Thank you for making my present brighter. And thank you for being a part of every future memory I still have to create. Happy Birthday, Hari. I love you more than I say, and probably less than you deserve. ❤️
